tasks.name: Buy the cheapest light-gray Scandinavian 3-seater sofa with 4+ stars under $900
tasks.description: Find a Scandinavian-style 3-seater sofa in light gray fabric, filter to items under $900 with a customer rating of at least 4 stars, sort by price low to high, and add the cheapest matching sofa to the cart with quantity 1.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Living Room" category in the main navigation menu.
On the Living Room page, click the "Sofas & Sectionals" subcategory.
In the filters sidebar, open the "Seating Capacity" filter and select the "3-seater" option.
Open the "Style" filter and select the "Scandinavian" checkbox.
Open the "Color" or "Fabric" filter and select the "Light Gray" option.
Open the "Price" filter and set the maximum price to "$900", then apply the filter.
Open the "Customer Rating" filter and select the "4 stars & up" option.
Use the sort dropdown above the product grid and choose "Price: Low to High".
From the sorted results, click on the first product card, then on the product detail page set quantity to 1 and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Create a compact home office setup under $800 with free shipping (desk, chair, lamp)
tasks.description: Select one desk, one office chair, and one desk lamp that all have free shipping and together cost no more than $800. Prioritize lowest-priced options that meet specific criteria, and add them all to the cart, removing the most expensive item if the total exceeds $800.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Home Office" category in the main navigation.
In the filters sidebar, locate and check the "Free Shipping" option to show only items with free shipping.
Click the "Desks" subcategory, set the maximum price filter to "$400", sort by "Price: Low to High", click the first desk in the list, and on its product page click "Add to Cart".
Use the breadcrumb or main navigation to return to the "Home Office" category and click the "Office Chairs" subcategory.
In the chair filters, keep "Free Shipping" selected, set the rating filter to "4 stars & up", sort by "Price: Low to High", click the first chair result, and on its product page click "Add to Cart".
Navigate back to the "Home Office" section and select the "Lighting" or "Desk Lamps" subcategory.

Set the maximum price filter for lamps to "$80", keep "Free Shipping" enabled, sort results by "Price: Low to High", click the first desk lamp shown, and add it to the cart from the product detail page.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page and view the combined total for the desk, chair, and lamp.

If the cart total is greater than $800, click the "Remove" or trash icon on the most expensive item in the cart; if the total is $800 or less, leave all three items in the cart without removing anything.

tasks.name: Book a living room makeover consultation for next Tuesday at 3:00 PM via video call
tasks.description: Use the design services booking flow to schedule a 'Living Room Makeover' consultation as a video call at the next available Tuesday 3:00 PM time slot, providing contact details and submitting the booking form.
steps: From the homepage, click "Design Services" in the main navigation.
On the Design Services overview page, locate the "Living Room Makeover" service and click its "Book a Consultation" button.
On the booking page, open the service type dropdown and select "Living Room Makeover" if it is not already selected.
In the appointment type section, select the "Video Call" option.
Open the date picker, navigate to the next week, and click on the first Tuesday date displayed.
In the list of available time slots for that Tuesday, click the "3:00 PM" time slot.
In the contact form, type "Alex Miller" in the name field, "alex.miller@example.com" in the email field, and "555-123-4567" in the phone number field.
In the notes or project details textbox, type "Focus on furniture layout and lighting for a small living room" and then click the "Submit Booking" or "Confirm Appointment" button.

tasks.name: Create an account and save a small apartment living room article to favorites
tasks.description: Register a new user account, then find a blog article about small apartment living rooms (using the 'Small Spaces' or similar tag) and save the first relevant article to your favorites list.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Sign Up" or "Create Account" link in the header.

On the registration form, enter "Taylor" in the first name field, "Lee" in the last name field, "taylor.lee@example.com" in the email field, "DesignTest1!" in the password field, and then click the "Create Account" or "Sign Up" button.
After the account is created, click the "Journal" or "Blog" link in the main navigation menu.
On the blog page, click the search field, type "small apartment living room", and press Enter to search.
In the search results, use the filters to select the "Small Spaces" topic or, if that is not available, select any tag related to "Living Room".
Scroll through the filtered list and click on the first article whose title mentions "small apartment" or "small space".
On the article detail page, scroll until you see a "Save", heart icon, or "Add to Favorites" control, and click it to save the article to your account favorites.

tasks.name: Use the style quiz and add two decor items under $60 that match the recommended style
tasks.description: Complete the style quiz to get a recommended style, then browse decor products filtered to that style and add one cushion and one rug, each priced under $60, to the cart starting from the highest-rated items.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Style Quiz" banner or link in the navigation.
On the quiz introduction page, click the "Start Quiz" button.
For each of the first three quiz questions, click one answer option of your choice, then continue through the quiz until you can click the "See My Style" or equivalent results button.
On the results screen, note the recommended style name (for example, "Modern", "Scandinavian", or "Bohemian") and click the "Shop This Style" or similar link that leads to products for that style.
On the style-specific product listing page, use the category filters to select "Decor" and, if available, additionally select the "Cushions" and "Rugs" subcategories.
Set a price filter with the maximum value set to "$60" and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the decor results by "Customer Rating: High to Low".
From the filtered and sorted list, click the first cushion product shown and on its product page click the "Add to Cart" button.
Navigate back to the decor listing for the same style using the browser back button or a breadcrumb, then click the first rug product shown and add it to the cart from its product detail page.

tasks.name: Configure a custom walnut shelving unit under $1200 with at least 3 shelves and 1 cabinet and save it
tasks.description: Use the custom furniture planner to design a wall shelving unit with 250 cm width and 220 cm height in walnut finish, including at least 3 shelf modules and 1 cabinet module, adjusting the design so that the total price is $1200 or less, then save the configuration to the wishlist.
steps: From the homepage, click "Custom Furniture" in the main navigation.
On the Custom Furniture page, click the "Design Your Shelving" or "Shelving Planner" tool.
In the dimension input fields, enter "250" for wall width in centimeters and "220" for height, then click the "Apply Dimensions" or similar button.
In the finish or material selector, click the "Walnut" option to set the shelving finish.
In the modules panel, click the "Add Shelf" button repeatedly until at least three shelf modules appear in the design area.
In the same modules panel, click the "Add Cabinet" button so that at least one cabinet module is added to the design.

Check the displayed total price of the configured shelving; if it is greater than $1200, click the "Remove" or delete icon on one shelf module and repeat removing shelves in the same way until the total price is $1200 or less.
Once the total price is $1200 or less, click the "Save Design" or "Save to Wishlist" button in the planner interface.
If a dialog prompts you to name the design, type "Walnut Wall Shelving 250cm" in the name field and click the "Save" or "Confirm" button.

tasks.name: Choose the better of two extendable solid wood dining tables for 6+ people under $1500 based on length
tasks.description: Filter dining tables to solid wood, extendable models for 6 or more people under $1500, open the first two matching tables, compare their extended lengths, and add the table with the greater extended length to the cart.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Dining Room" category in the main navigation and then select the "Dining Tables" subcategory.
In the filters sidebar, open the "Material" filter and select the "Solid Wood" option.
Open the "Seating Capacity" filter and select the "6+ seats" option.
Open the "Table Type" or "Features" filter and select the "Extendable" option.
Open the "Price" filter, set the maximum price to "$1500", and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the filtered tables by "Price: Low to High".
From the resulting product list, open the first two table product cards by Ctrl+clicking or Command+clicking each product image or title so they each open in a new tab.
In the first table's tab, scroll to the specifications section and note the extended length value, then switch to the second table's tab and note its extended length value.
Between the two tables, choose the one with the longer extended length, and on that table's product page set quantity to 1 and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Request a quote for a mid-range neutral bedroom makeover package for a 12–15 m² room
tasks.description: Select a Bedroom Makeover design package configured for a 12–15 m² room with a neutral color palette and the mid-priced (standard) tier, then submit a quote request form with specified contact details and preferred contact method as email.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Design Packages" or similar link in the main navigation.
On the packages page, find the "Bedroom Makeover" section and click its "View Details" or "Choose Package" button.
In the room size dropdown on the package configuration area, select the option that covers 12–15 m² (for example, "10–15 m²").
In the color palette section, click the swatch or option labeled "Neutral" or "Calm Neutrals".
In the package tier selector, choose the middle option such as "Standard" if the choices are "Basic", "Standard", and "Premium".
Click the "Request a Quote" button associated with the configured Bedroom Makeover package.

On the quote request form, type "Morgan Rivera" in the name field, "morgan.rivera@example.com" in the email field, and "Small master bedroom refresh, keep existing bed" in the project details or message field.
In the preferred contact method options, select "Email" and then click the "Send Request" or "Submit" button to submit the quote request.

website_type: furniture and interior design studio website
